headline: CoinShares Launches $200M Bitcoin Mining ETF in Europe

article.title: CoinShares debuts Bitcoin mining ETF in Europe entrance
article.summary: The UCITS ETF, CoinShares’ first in Europe, began trading on Deutsche Börse Xetra, tracking a rules-based index of publicly listed BTC miners.

headline: Arcus DEX Grows 30% With Tokenized Assets Added

article.title: Robinhood-backed DEX Arcus expands with tokenized assets, perps
article.summary: Arcus, built by the dYdX team, adds tokenized stocks and perpetual futures on Robinhood Chain as platforms compete to bring traditional assets onchain.

headline: India Buys 30% More Russian Oil Amid Sanctions

article.summary: Deliveries of Russian crude oil to India so far this month remain near June’s record

headline: Oil Tankers Divert: $100M Cargo At Risk Daily

article.title: Oil Tankers Turn Back in Red Sea After Houthi Attack Threat
article.summary: Three oil tankers have made U-turns in the southern Red Sea after warnings from Houthi rebels in Yemen that they would target ships heading to or from Saudi ports.
